message.content:
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

participant "SNS" as SNS #Pink
box Lambda #Orange
    participant "Update\nRelationship\nEvent Handler" as URH
end box
package DynamoDB #Blue {
  entity "Relationship Owner Table" as ROTable 
} ||| package ""{entity "Relationship Commitment Table"}|||#White


activate SNS
note right of SNS : filter on \n Relationship::Update Event 

URH ->> URH: [SessionDecorator.puml]
deactivate SNS
activate URH
URH->>URH:[TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
rotate left
return extract Message from Event
return validate Message
return validate event-name
return validate event-version
return validate stage
ROT <-[dotted]- URH:Get Existing Relationship
return Generate Relationship Dict
return Combine Existing Relationship Attributes With New Changes
opt if missing required schema key
   note over URH:#Red Error Handling#Black  
else Get AdditionalAttributes   
alt if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes doesn't contain completed signal1    
     return update Relationship     
      else error handling       
        rotate left        
         alt if commitment operations exist          
           generate starting indexes based on additional attributes           
            batch_write() relationshipscommitments             
             trackeventhandlerwrapper              
              end               
               endif                
                rot <<-- urh:update relationship                 
                 deactivate rotable                  
                  activate urh                   
                   opt if commit operation exists                    
                     getadditionalattributes                     
                      combineexistingrelationshipattributeswithnewchanges                      
                       generaterelationshipdict                        
                        valdatestage                         
                          validatedversion                          
                           validatename                            
                            validateschema                             
                              tracereventhandlerevents                              
                               errortracking                                
                                 sessiondecoratorpml                                    
                                  updatershipowner                                     
                                   writebatch                                       
                                    writetocommit                                        
                                     writesuccessful                                          
                                       successmessage                                            
                                          done                                              
                                            finish                                                
                                              complete                                                  
                                                terminate                                                   
                                                  stop                                                      
                                                     halt                                                         
                                                        pause                                                          
                                                         wait                                                           
                                                              idle                                                              
                                                                sleep                                                                
                                                                  rest
